packages/core/src/index.ts.summary: Public barrel for @clack/core: re-exports every Prompt class, its option/state types, and selected utils (block, isCancel, settings, updateSettings, wrapTextWithPrefix).
packages/core/src/index.ts.outputs: Named + default re-exports of prompt classes, type aliases, and util functions.
packages/core/src/index.ts.should: Stay a thin re-export surface defining the core package's public API.
packages/core/src/index.ts.shouldNot: Contain logic, rendering, or IO; introduce implementations.

packages/core/src/types.ts.summary: Shared type definitions: ClackState union and the ClackEvents typed emitter interface keyed by event name.
packages/core/src/types.ts.should: Declare prompt state and event contract types only.
packages/core/src/types.ts.shouldNot: Contain runtime code, values, or IO.

packages/core/src/prompts/prompt.ts.summary: Base Prompt class: readline setup, raw-mode keypress handling, typed event emitter, validate-on-submit, cancel/abort handling, and diff-based terminal frame rendering.
packages/core/src/prompts/prompt.ts.inputs: PromptOptions (render, validate, input/output streams, signal, initial input).
packages/core/src/prompts/prompt.ts.outputs: prompt() Promise resolving to value or CANCEL_SYMBOL; emits events; writes ANSI frames to output.
packages/core/src/prompts/prompt.ts.should: Own the input loop, state transitions, subscription plumbing, and render diffing shared by all prompts.
packages/core/src/prompts/prompt.ts.shouldNot: Hardcode a specific prompt's UI text or option semantics.

packages/core/src/prompts/autocomplete.t.summary: AutocompletePrompt: type-ahead filtering over options with single/multiple selection, navigation mode, cursor tracking, and placeholder-fill on Tab.
packages/core/src/prompts/autocomplete.t.inputs: AutocompleteOptions (options list/fn, filter, multiple, placeholder, initialValue).
packages/core/src/prompts/autocomplete.t.outputs: Filtered options, selectedValues, focusedValue, userInputWithCursor; sets value on return.
packages/core/src/prompts/autocomplete.t.should: Manage filtering, cursor/navigation, and selection state.
packages/core/src/prompts/autocomplete.t.shouldNot: Emit styled terminal output or handle raw stream IO directly.

packages/core/src/prompts/confirm.ts.summary: ConfirmPrompt: boolean yes/no prompt toggled by cursor/userInput/confirm events, with cursor index derived from value.
packages/core/src/prompts/confirm.ts.outputs: boolean value; auto-submits on y/n confirm event.
packages/core/src/prompts/confirm.ts.should: Track boolean state and react to toggle/confirm events.
packages/core/src/prompts/confirm.ts.shouldNot: Render UI or perform IO beyond a cursor move on confirm.

packages/core/src/prompts/date.ts.summary: DatePrompt: segmented (year/month/day) date editor with locale/format detection, per-segment digit entry, arrow adjust, min/max bounds, clamping and inline validation.
packages/core/src/prompts/date.ts.inputs: DateOptions (format, locale, separator, min/max, initial/default Date).
packages/core/src/prompts/date.ts.outputs: value as Date|undefined, segmentValues, segmentCursor, formattedValue, inlineError.
packages/core/src/prompts/date.ts.should: Own date segment parsing, navigation, digit placement, and calendar validity.
packages/core/src/prompts/date.ts.shouldNot: Style output or resolve the final display string.

packages/core/src/prompts/group-multisel.summary: GroupMultiSelectPrompt: multi-select over grouped options, flattening groups into a cursor list, toggling items or whole groups, with optional selectable group headers.
packages/core/src/prompts/group-multisel.outputs: value as selected value[]; cursor; group helpers (getGroupItems, isGroupSelected).
packages/core/src/prompts/group-multisel.should: Maintain grouped selection state and cursor movement skipping group headers when needed.

packages/core/src/prompts/multi-select.t.summary: MultiSelectPrompt: checkbox-style selection over a flat option list with toggle, toggle-all ('a'), invert ('i'), disabled-option skipping via findCursor.
packages/core/src/prompts/multi-select.t.outputs: value as selected value[]; cursor index.
packages/core/src/prompts/multi-select.t.should: Manage multi-selection and cursor navigation over enabled options.
packages/core/src/prompts/multi-select.t.shouldNot: Style output or do stream IO.

packages/core/src/prompts/password.ts.summary: PasswordPrompt: masked text input exposing masked string and cursor-annotated masked view; mirrors userInput into value.
packages/core/src/prompts/password.ts.outputs: value string, masked, userInputWithCursor; clear() to reset input.
packages/core/src/prompts/password.ts.should: Mask displayed input and keep value synced to typed text.
packages/core/src/prompts/password.ts.shouldNot: Log or persist the plaintext beyond the value; render full frames.

packages/core/src/prompts/select-key.ts.summary: SelectKeyPrompt: single-select driven by pressing an option's initial-letter key, with optional case sensitivity; submits immediately on match.
packages/core/src/prompts/select-key.ts.inputs: SelectKeyOptions (options with string values, caseSensitive, initialValue).
packages/core/src/prompts/select-key.ts.outputs: value string; auto-submits on matching key.
packages/core/src/prompts/select-key.ts.should: Map keypresses to option values and submit.
packages/core/src/prompts/select-key.ts.shouldNot: Render output or handle arrow navigation.

packages/core/src/prompts/select.ts.summary: SelectPrompt: single-choice list navigated with arrows, skipping disabled options via findCursor and tracking the selected value.
packages/core/src/prompts/select.ts.outputs: value = current option's value; cursor index.
packages/core/src/prompts/select.ts.should: Move the cursor over enabled options and update value.

packages/core/src/prompts/text.ts.summary: TextPrompt: free-text input with cursor-annotated view, initial value seeding, and default-value fallback on finalize.
packages/core/src/prompts/text.ts.should: Sync value to typed input and apply default on empty submit.
packages/core/src/prompts/text.ts.shouldNot: Render styled frames or perform stream IO.

packages/core/src/utils/cursor.ts.summary: findCursor helper: advances a list cursor by delta, wrapping at bounds and skipping disabled options, returning the original when none are enabled.
packages/core/src/utils/cursor.ts.inputs: current cursor, delta, options array with optional disabled flag.
packages/core/src/utils/cursor.ts.should: Compute the next selectable index deterministically.

packages/core/src/utils/index.ts.summary: Core utils barrel + terminal helpers: CANCEL_SYMBOL/isCancel, setRawMode, block() input-blocker, getColumns/getRows, wrapTextWithPrefix; re-exports settings and string utils.
packages/core/src/utils/index.ts.outputs: Symbols, dimension numbers, wrapped strings; block returns a cleanup fn and writes ANSI.
packages/core/src/utils/index.ts.should: Provide stream/terminal utility functions and re-export settings/string.
packages/core/src/utils/index.ts.shouldNot: Implement prompt UI or option logic.

packages/core/src/utils/settings.ts.summary: Global in-memory settings: default actions, key aliases (incl. vim), messages, date localization, plus updateSettings merger and isActionKey alias matcher.
packages/core/src/utils/settings.ts.inputs: ClackSettings updates; raw keys and Action names for matching.
packages/core/src/utils/settings.ts.outputs: Mutable settings object, Action type, isActionKey boolean.
packages/core/src/utils/settings.ts.should: Hold configurable defaults and additively merge user overrides.
packages/core/src/utils/settings.ts.shouldNot: Overwrite existing aliases or do terminal IO.

packages/core/src/utils/string.ts.summary: diffLines: compares two multiline strings and reports which line indices differ plus before/after line counts.
packages/core/src/utils/string.ts.outputs: undefined if equal, else {lines, numLinesBefore, numLinesAfter, numLines}.
packages/core/src/utils/string.ts.should: Compute the minimal line-diff used by the renderer.

packages/prompts/src/index.ts.summary: Public barrel for @clack/prompts: re-exports all prompt/UI helpers and a few @clack/core primitives (settings, isCancel).
packages/prompts/src/index.ts.outputs: Star re-exports of every prompt and helper module.
packages/prompts/src/index.ts.should: Define the package's public API surface.

packages/prompts/src/common.ts.summary: Shared UI primitives: unicode/CI/TTY detection, box-drawing & status symbol constants, and state-to-styled-symbol mappers plus CommonOptions interface.
packages/prompts/src/common.ts.inputs: State value; environment (unicode support, process.env.CI, output.isTTY).
packages/prompts/src/common.ts.outputs: Symbol string constants, symbol()/symbolBar() styled glyphs, CommonOptions type.
packages/prompts/src/common.ts.should: Centralize glyphs, environment checks, and common option typing.
packages/prompts/src/common.ts.shouldNot: Implement prompt behavior or write to streams.

packages/prompts/src/autocomplete.ts.summary: autocomplete() and autocompleteMultiselect() wrappers: construct AutocompletePrompt with a default label/hint/value filter and render search UI, match counts, and option lists.
packages/prompts/src/autocomplete.ts.outputs: Promise of selected value(s) or cancel symbol; terminal frames.
packages/prompts/src/autocomplete.ts.should: Wire core AutocompletePrompt to a styled render and default filtering.
packages/prompts/src/autocomplete.ts.shouldNot: Reimplement filtering/selection state owned by core.

packages/prompts/src/box.ts.summary: box(): renders a bordered box around a message with optional title, alignment, padding, width, rounded corners, and custom border formatting.
packages/prompts/src/box.ts.inputs: message, title, BoxOptions (align, width, padding, rounded, formatBorder).
packages/prompts/src/box.ts.outputs: Writes the composed box directly to output stream.
packages/prompts/src/box.ts.should: Compute layout/padding and draw the box.
packages/prompts/src/box.ts.shouldNot: Capture input or manage prompt state.

packages/prompts/src/confirm.ts.summary: confirm(): wraps core ConfirmPrompt to render a yes/no toggle with active/inactive labels, optional vertical layout, and guide bars.
packages/prompts/src/confirm.ts.should: Render the confirm UI and delegate state to core.

packages/prompts/src/date.ts.summary: date(): wraps core DatePrompt, adding min/max/default validation messages and rendering segment placeholders, active-segment highlight, and inline errors.
packages/prompts/src/date.ts.inputs: DateOptions (message, format, locale, min/max, default/initial, validate).
packages/prompts/src/date.ts.outputs: Promise<Date | symbol>; styled frames via renderDate/renderSegment.
packages/prompts/src/date.ts.should: Render date segments and compose validation.

packages/prompts/src/group-multi-select..summary: groupMultiselect(): wraps core GroupMultiSelectPrompt, rendering grouped checkbox lists with group headers, spacing, active/selected states, and required validation.
packages/prompts/src/group-multi-select..inputs: GroupMultiSelectOptions (message, grouped options, initialValues, required, selectableGroups, groupSpacing).
packages/prompts/src/group-multi-select..should: Render grouped multiselect UI and validation.

packages/prompts/src/group.ts.summary: group(): sequentially runs a keyed set of prompt-returning functions, threading prior results and invoking onCancel when a step is cancelled.
packages/prompts/src/group.ts.inputs: PromptGroup map of name->prompt fn, optional onCancel.
packages/prompts/src/group.ts.outputs: Promise resolving to an object of each prompt's result.
packages/prompts/src/group.ts.should: Orchestrate ordered prompts and pass accumulated results.
packages/prompts/src/group.ts.shouldNot: Render UI or manage individual prompt internals.

packages/prompts/src/limit-options.ts.summary: limitOptions(): computes a sliding window of option rows to fit terminal height, wrapping lines and inserting top/bottom ellipses when trimmed.
packages/prompts/src/limit-options.ts.inputs: LimitOptionsParams (options, cursor, style fn, maxItems, padding, output).
packages/prompts/src/limit-options.ts.outputs: Array of rendered/wrapped line strings for display.
packages/prompts/src/limit-options.ts.should: Handle viewport windowing, wrapping, and overflow indicators.
packages/prompts/src/limit-options.ts.shouldNot: Fetch input or own selection state.

packages/prompts/src/log.ts.summary: log object: message/info/success/step/warn/error helpers that prefix lines with state symbols and guide bars and write to output.
packages/prompts/src/log.ts.inputs: message string(s), LogMessageOptions (symbol, spacing, output, withGuide).
packages/prompts/src/log.ts.outputs: Writes formatted log lines to the output stream.
packages/prompts/src/log.ts.should: Format and print non-interactive log messages.
packages/prompts/src/log.ts.shouldNot: Read input or hold prompt state.

packages/prompts/src/messages.ts.summary: intro/cancel/outro helpers: print start/cancel/end banner lines with guide-bar prefixes and color to the output stream.

packages/prompts/src/multi-select.ts.summary: multiselect(): wraps core MultiSelectPrompt, rendering checkbox options with active/selected/disabled states, hints, wrapped labels, required validation, and windowing.
packages/prompts/src/multi-select.ts.inputs: MultiSelectOptions (message, options, initialValues, maxItems, required, cursorAt).

packages/prompts/src/note.ts.summary: note(): renders a boxed, titled note with wrapped, formatted message lines and border glyphs, accounting for format-added width.
packages/prompts/src/note.ts.outputs: Writes the framed note to output.
packages/prompts/src/note.ts.should: Wrap, pad, and draw the note box.

packages/prompts/src/password.ts.summary: password(): wraps core PasswordPrompt, rendering masked input with guide bars, error/submit/cancel states, and optional clear-on-error.
packages/prompts/src/password.ts.should: Render masked password UI and delegate to core.

packages/prompts/src/path.ts.summary: path(): filesystem path picker built on autocomplete(), listing directory entries by reading the fs as the user types, filtering to dirs when requested.
packages/prompts/src/path.ts.outputs: Promise of selected path string or cancel symbol.
packages/prompts/src/path.ts.should: Provide fs-backed path suggestions and validation.

packages/prompts/src/progress-bar.ts.summary: progress(): builds a spinner-backed progress bar with styled fill chars, max/size scaling, and advance()/message() to update completion.
packages/prompts/src/progress-bar.ts.should: Track progress value and render the bar via spinner.

packages/prompts/src/select.ts.summary: select(): wraps core SelectPrompt, rendering a single-choice radio list with active/selected/disabled/cancelled states, hints, label wrapping, and windowing; defines the Option type.
packages/prompts/src/select.ts.outputs: Promise<Value | symbol>; styled frames; exported Option<Value> type.
packages/prompts/src/select.ts.should: Render select UI and expose the shared Option type.

packages/prompts/src/select-key.ts.summary: selectKey(): wraps core SelectKeyPrompt, rendering key-badge options and submitting on the matching initial-letter keypress.
packages/prompts/src/select-key.ts.should: Render key-based select UI and delegate keypress logic to core.

packages/prompts/src/spinner.ts.summary: spinner(): animated loading indicator with dots/timer modes, CI fallback, process/signal exit hooks, and start/stop/cancel/error/message/clear controls.
packages/prompts/src/spinner.ts.inputs: SpinnerOptions (indicator, frames, delay, messages, output, signal).
packages/prompts/src/spinner.ts.outputs: SpinnerResult controlling a setInterval render loop and stream writes.
packages/prompts/src/spinner.ts.should: Manage the animation loop, timers, and process exit handling.
packages/prompts/src/spinner.ts.shouldNot: Capture user keystroke input for a value.

packages/prompts/src/stream.ts.summary: stream object: async message/info/success/etc. helpers that consume (async) iterables of text and print them with guide-bar prefixes and width-aware wrapping.
packages/prompts/src/stream.ts.outputs: Writes streamed, prefixed text to process.stdout.
packages/prompts/src/stream.ts.shouldNot: Support custom output writables (relies on stdout.columns) or hold state.

packages/prompts/src/task-log.ts.summary: taskLog(): buffered task logger that shows live output (TTY), clears on success, retains/prints on error, with grouped sub-buffers, line limits, and ANSI stripping.
packages/prompts/src/task-log.ts.inputs: TaskLogOptions (title, limit, spacing, retainLog); message/group/success/error calls.
packages/prompts/src/task-log.ts.outputs: Writes and erases terminal lines; returns a logger handle.
packages/prompts/src/task-log.ts.should: Manage the log buffer lifecycle and TTY-aware rendering.
packages/prompts/src/task-log.ts.shouldNot: Prompt for input or own unrelated spinner logic.

packages/prompts/src/task.ts.summary: tasks(): runs an array of async tasks sequentially, driving a spinner per task, skipping disabled ones, and showing each result.
packages/prompts/src/task.ts.should: Sequence tasks and surface progress via spinner.
packages/prompts/src/task.ts.shouldNot: Render its own UI beyond the spinner.

packages/prompts/src/text.ts.summary: text(): wraps core TextPrompt, rendering a free-text input with placeholder, cursor, guide bars, and error/submit/cancel states.
packages/prompts/src/text.ts.should: Render the text input UI and delegate value logic to core.
